title: USEC_AUTHENTICATE
text: USEC_AUTHENTICATE Authenticate the user name and password combination. Use Client/server security drivers Return Values USEC_SUCCESS Authentication successful, no information returned USEC_ERROR Authentication failed, error returned in Error members Description Authenticate the user name and password combination. The user name and passwords are null-terminated strings provided in the Username and Passwd members of the uSecDrv . On Microsoft Windows platforms, a user token is required to create a process running under that user account. Irrespective of the validation scheme used, a successful validation must deliver a user token (in UserToken ), suitable for use in the Windows function CreateProcessAsUser() . Was this topic helpful?
